revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: ''''ミカシキヤヒメ'''は、[[日本神話]]に登場する女神。『[[日本書紀]]』では三炊屋媛、鳥見屋媛、長髄媛、『[[古事記]]...'
revision.text:
'''ミカシキヤヒメ'''は、[[日本神話]]に登場する女神。『[[日本書紀]]』では三炊屋媛、鳥見屋媛、長髄媛、『[[古事記]]』では登美夜毘売と記する。御炊屋姫、櫛玉姫命、櫛玉比女命、櫛玉比売命、などとも表記される。
[[長髄彦]]の妹で、[[饒速日]]の妻となる。饒速日との間に[[物部氏]]の祖先神である、[[ウマシマジ|可美真手]]を生んだ。
== 関連項目 == * [[日本の神の一覧]]
{{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:日本の神]]
[[zh:三炊屋媛]]

revision.comment: r2.7.1) (ロボットによる: [[zh:三炊屋媛]]を除去
revision.text:
'''ミカシキヤヒメ'''は、[[日本神話]]に登場する女神。『[[日本書紀]]』では三炊屋媛、鳥見屋媛、長髄媛、『[[古事記]]』では登美夜毘売と記する。御炊屋姫、櫛玉姫命、櫛玉比女命、櫛玉比売命、などとも表記される。
[[長髄彦]]の妹で、[[饒速日]]の妻となる。饒速日との間に[[物部氏]]の祖先神である、[[ウマシマジ|可美真手]]を生んだ。
== 関連項目 == * [[日本の神の一覧]]
{{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:日本の神]]

'''ミカシキヤヒメ'''は、[[日本神話]]に登場する女神。『[[日本書紀]]』では三炊屋媛、鳥見屋媛、長髄媛、『[[古事記]]』では登美夜毘売と記する。御炊屋姫、櫛玉姫命、櫛玉比女命、櫛玉比売命、などとも表記される。
[[長髄彦]]の妹で、[[饒速日]]の妻となる。饒速日との間に[[物部氏]]の祖先神である、[[ウマシマジ|可美真手]]を生んだ。
== 関連項目 == * [[日本の神の一覧]]
{{デフォルトソート:みかしきやひめ}} {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:日本の神]]

'''ミカシキヤヒメ'''は、[[日本神話]]に登場する女神。『[[日本書紀]]』では三炊屋媛、鳥見屋媛、長髄媛、『[[古事記]]』では登美夜毘売と記する。御炊屋姫、櫛玉姫命、櫛玉比女命、櫛玉比売命、などとも表記される。
[[長髄彦]]の妹で、[[饒速日]]の妻となる。饒速日との間に[[物部氏]]、[[穂積氏]]らの祖先神である、[[ウマシマジ|可美真手]]を生んだ。
== 関連項目 == * [[日本の神の一覧]]
{{デフォルトソート:みかしきやひめ}} {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:日本の神]]

'''ミカシキヤヒメ'''は、[[日本神話]]に登場する女神。『[[日本書紀]]』では三炊屋媛、鳥見屋媛、長髄媛、『[[古事記]]』では登美夜毘売と記する。御炊屋姫、櫛玉姫命、櫛玉比女命、櫛玉比売命、などとも表記される。
[[長髄彦]]の妹で、[[饒速日]]の妻となる。饒速日との間に[[物部氏]]、[[穂積氏]]らの祖先神である、[[ウマシマジ|可美真手]]を生んだ。
== 関連項目 == * [[日本の神の一覧]]
{{デフォルトソート:みかしきやひめ}} {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:日本の神]] [[Category:国津神]]

'''ミカシキヤヒメ'''は、[[日本神話]]に登場する[[神 (神道)|女神]]。
== 概要 == 『[[古事記]]』では'''登美夜毘売'''、『[[日本書紀]]』では'''三炊屋媛'''、'''鳥見屋媛'''、'''長髄媛'''と記する。また御炊屋姫、櫛玉姫命、櫛玉比女命、櫛玉比売命などとも表記される。
== 系譜 == [[事代主神]]の娘であり[[長髄彦|那賀須泥毘古]]の妹で、[[邇芸速日命]]の妻となる。邇芸速日命との間に[[物部氏]]、[[穂積氏]]らの祖神である、[[ウマシマジ|宇麻志摩遅命]]を生んだ<ref>中田憲信「物部大連（穂積宿禰）」『諸系譜』第三十三冊。</ref>
== 関連項目 == * [[日本の神の一覧]]
{{デフォルトソート:みかしきやひめ}} {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:日本の神]] [[Category:国津神]]

== 系譜 == [[事代主神]]の娘であり[[長髄彦|那賀須泥毘古]]の妹で、[[邇芸速日命]]の妻となる。邇芸速日命との間に[[物部氏]]、[[穂積氏]]らの祖神である、[[ウマシマジ|宇麻志摩遅命]]を生んだ<ref>中田憲信「物部大連（穂積宿禰）」『諸系譜』第三十三冊。</ref>

== 概要 == 『[[古事記]]』では'''登美夜毘売'''（とみやびめ）、『[[日本書紀]]』では'''三炊屋媛'''、'''鳥見屋媛'''、'''長髄媛'''（ながすねびめ）と記する。また'''御炊屋姫'''、'''櫛玉姫命'''、'''櫛玉比女命'''、'''櫛玉比売命'''などとも表記される。
== 系譜 == [[事代主神]]の娘であり[[長髄彦|那賀須泥毘古]]の妹で、[[邇芸速日命]]の妻となる。邇芸速日命との間に[[物部氏]]、[[穂積氏]]らの祖神である、[[ウマシマジ|宇麻志摩遅命]]を生んだ<ref>中田憲信「物部大連（穂積宿禰）」『諸系譜』第三十三冊。</ref>
ただし、事代主神は[[神武天皇]]の一世代前にあたるため{{efn|娘の[[比売多多良伊須気余理比売]]が神武皇后。}}、神武世代の宇麻志摩遅命を生んだミカシキヤヒメと事代主神が親子関係であったとは考えられず、実際には那賀須泥毘古（その実態は[[建御名方神]]）と共に事代主神の弟であったとする説がある<ref>宝賀寿男「阿波の長国造の移遷」『古代氏族の研究⑦ 三輪氏 大物主神の祭祀者』青垣出版、2015年、117頁、118頁。</ref>。
== 祀る神社 == * [[櫛玉命神社]]（[[奈良県]][[高市郡]][[明日香村]]） * [[櫛玉比女命神社]]（奈良県[[北葛城郡]][[広陵町]]） * [[石切剣箭神社]] 境内 登美霊社（[[大阪府]][[東大阪市]][[東石切町]]） * [[櫛田神社 (松阪市)|櫛田神社]]（[[三重県]][[松阪市]][[櫛田町]]） * [[櫛玉比売命神社]]（[[愛媛県]][[松山市]]高田）
== 脚注 == {{Notelist}}

== 概要 == 『[[古事記]]』では'''登美夜毘売'''（とみやびめ）、『[[日本書紀]]』では'''三炊屋媛'''、'''鳥見屋媛'''、'''長髄媛'''（ながすねびめ）と記する。また'''御炊屋姫'''、'''櫛玉姫命'''、'''櫛玉比女命'''、'''櫛玉比売命'''などとも表記される。

== 系譜 == [[事代主]]神の娘であり[[長髄彦|那賀須泥毘古]]の妹で、[[ニギハヤヒ|邇芸速日命]]の妻となる。邇芸速日命との間に[[物部氏]]、[[穂積氏]]らの祖神である[[ウマシマジ|宇麻志摩遅命]]を生んだ<ref>中田憲信「物部大連（穂積宿禰）」『諸系譜』第三十三冊。</ref>。
ただし、事代主神は[[神武天皇]]の一世代前にあたるため{{efn|娘の[[ヒメタタライスズヒメ|比売多多良伊須気余理比売]]が神武天皇の后。}}、神武世代の宇麻志摩遅命を生んだミカシキヤヒメと事代主神が親子関係であったとは考えられず、実際には那賀須泥毘古と共に事代主神の妹であったとする説がある。この場合、那賀須泥毘古は事代主神の弟になることや、[[天孫族]]に抵抗したという事績から[[タケミナカタ|建御名方神]]と同神であった可能性が指摘されている<ref>宝賀寿男「阿波の長国造の移遷」『古代氏族の研究⑦ 三輪氏 大物主神の祭祀者』青垣出版、2015年、117頁、118頁。</ref>。
== 祀る神社 == * [[櫛玉命神社]]（[[奈良県]][[高市郡]][[明日香村]]） * [[櫛玉比女命神社]]（奈良県[[北葛城郡]][[広陵町]]） * [[石切剣箭神社]] 境内 登美霊社（[[大阪府]][[東大阪市]][[東石切町]]） * [[櫛田神社 (松阪市)|櫛田神社]]（[[三重県]][[松阪市]][[櫛田町]]） * [[櫛玉比売命神社]]（[[愛媛県]][[松山市]]高田）

{{基礎情報 公家 | 氏名 = 三炊屋媛 | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 時代 = 上古、[[弥生時代]] | 生誕 = 不明 | 死没 = 不明 | 改名 = | 別名 = 御炊屋姫、御炊屋姫命<ref name="keifu">[[中田憲信]]『神別系譜』、[[東京国立博物館]]デジタルライブラリー。</ref><ref name="keifu2">中田憲信「山村」『諸系譜』、東京国立博物館デジタルライブラリー。</ref>、御炊屋日売<ref name="keifu"/>、御炊屋日売命<ref name="keifu3">中田憲信「黒川」『諸系譜』、東京国立博物館デジタルライブラリー。</ref>、御炊屋比咩<ref name="keifu4">[[鈴木真年]]「物部大連十市部首」『諸系譜』第一冊。</ref>、登美御炊屋媛命<ref name="kamei">『亀井家譜』東京大学史料編纂所データベース。</ref>、登美夜毘売、登美夜日売命<ref name="keifu3"/>、鳥見屋媛、長髄媛、櫛玉姫命、櫛玉比女命、櫛玉比売命 等 | 諡号 = | 神号 = | 戒名 = | 墓所 = | 官位 = | 主君 = | 氏族 = [[大神氏|三輪君]]同族 | 父母 = 父：[[事代主神|飛鳥大神]]<ref name="kamei"/><ref name="honzyo">『本荘家譜』東京大学史料編纂所データベース。</ref>（飛鳥神<ref name="keifu"/><ref name="keifu4"/>、飛鳥太神<ref name="keifu3"/>）または[[味鉏高日子根命]]<ref name="keifu"/> | 兄弟 = 多伎都比古命<ref name="keifu"/>、塩冶毘古命<ref name="keifu"/>、[[天日方奇日方命]]<ref name="keifu"/>、[[比売多々良伊須気余理比売命]]<ref name="keifu"/>、[[天八現津彦命]]<ref name="keifu"/>、[[五十鈴依比売命]]<ref name="keifu"/>、美津佐々良毘売命<ref name="keifu"/>、吾娥津媛命<ref name="keifu"/>、[[鳥見長髄彦命]]（兄）<ref name="keifu"/><ref name="keifu2"/><ref name="keifu5">鈴木真年「物部大連穂積宿祢」『諸系譜』第三十三冊。</ref><ref name="oshikoji">『押小路家譜』東京大学史料編纂所データベース。</ref> | 妻 = | 子 = [[宇摩志麻遅命]]<ref name="keifu"/><ref name="keifu2"/><ref name="keifu3"/><ref name="keifu4"/><ref name="kamei"/><ref name="honzyo"/><ref name="keifu5"/><ref name="oshikoji"/> | 特記事項 = [[饒速日命]]妻 }} '''三炊屋媛'''（ミカシキヤヒメ、[[生没年不詳]]）は、古代[[日本]]の女性。
== 概要 == 『[[古事記]]』では'''登美夜毘売'''（とみやびめ）、『[[日本書紀]]』では'''三炊屋媛'''、'''鳥見屋媛'''、'''長髄媛'''（ながすねびめ）と記する。また'''御炊屋姫'''、'''櫛玉姫命'''、'''櫛玉比女命'''、'''櫛玉比売命'''などとも表記される。
== 系譜 == [[長髄彦|那賀須泥毘古]]の妹で、[[ニギハヤヒ|邇芸速日命]]の妻となる。邇芸速日命との間に[[物部氏]]、[[穂積氏]]らの祖神である[[ウマシマジ|宇麻志摩遅命]]を生んだ<ref>中田憲信「物部大連（穂積宿禰）」『諸系譜』第三十三冊。</ref>。
ただし、事代主神は[[神武天皇]]の一世代前にあたるため{{efn|娘の[[ヒメタタライスズヒメ|比売多多良伊須気余理比売]]が神武天皇の后。}}、神武世代の宇麻志摩遅命を生んだミカシキヤヒメと事代主神が親子関係であったとは考えられず、実際には事代主神の妹であったとする説がある。この場合、那賀須泥毘古は事代主神の弟になることや、[[天孫族]]に抵抗したという事績から[[タケミナカタ|建御名方神]]と同神であった可能性が指摘されている<ref>宝賀寿男「阿波の長国造の移遷」『古代氏族の研究⑦ 三輪氏 大物主神の祭祀者』青垣出版、2015年、117頁、118頁。</ref>。
== 祀る神社 == * [[櫛玉命神社]]（[[奈良県]][[高市郡]][[明日香村]]） * [[櫛玉比女命神社]]（奈良県[[北葛城郡]][[広陵町]]） * [[石切剣箭神社]] 境内 登美霊社（[[大阪府]][[東大阪市]][[東石切町]]） * [[櫛田神社 (松阪市)|櫛田神社]]（[[三重県]][[松阪市]][[櫛田町]]） * [[櫛玉比売命神社]]（[[愛媛県]][[松山市]]高田）
== 脚注 == {{Notelist}}
== 参考文献 == {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == * [[日本の神の一覧]] * [[飛鳥時代以前の人物一覧]]

== 祀る神社 == * [[石切剣箭神社]]: [[石切剣箭神社#上之社|上之社境内]] 登美霊社、婦道神社（[[大阪府]][[東大阪市]][[東石切町]]） * [[矢田坐久志玉比古神社]] * [[櫛玉比女命神社]]
== 脚注 == {{Notelist}}
== 参考文献 == {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == * [[日本の神の一覧]] * [[飛鳥時代以前の人物一覧]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:ミカシキヤヒメ]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:31, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox noble | name = Mikashikiyahime | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = Ancient | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | alias = Mikashikiyahime, Nagasunehime, Torimiyahime<ref name="#1">Nihon Shoki</ref>, Tomiyabime<ref name="#2">Kojiki</ref>, Tomiyabime, Mishikiyahime, Mishikiyahime<ref name="#3">Sendai Kujihongi</ref> | titles = | deification = | posthumous_name = | burial_place = | Rank = | lord = | clan = | parents = | siblings = {{ill|Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagasunehiko|ja|長髄彦|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagasunehiko|qq=}}<ref name="#2"/><ref name="#1"/><ref name="#3"/> | spouse ={{ill|Nigihayahi|fr}} | children = {{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}<ref>Sendai Kujihongi, "Tenson Hongi"</ref> | notable_facts = Wife of {{ill|Nigihayahi no Mikoto|ja|饒速日命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ|1=Nigihayahi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10949054}} |child={{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}<ref>Sendai Kujihongi, "Tenson Hongi"</ref>|issue={{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}<ref>Sendai Kujihongi, "Tenson Hongi"</ref>|father=[[Kotoshironushi]]}}
'''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛, dates unknown) was an ancient Japanese woman.
== Overview == In the [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], she is referred to as '''Tomiyabime''' (登美夜毘売), while the [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] calls her '''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛), '''Torimiyahime''' (鳥見屋媛), or '''Nagasunehime''' (長髄媛). She is also known by names such as '''Mishikiyahime''' (御炊屋姫), '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto''' (櫛玉姫命), or '''Kushitama-hime''' (櫛玉比売命).
== Lineage == Mikashikiyahime was the sister of {{ill|Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagasunehiko|ja|長髄彦|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagasunehiko|qq=}} and the wife of {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|饒速日命|lt=Nigihayahi no Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ}}. Together, they had a son, {{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}, who became the ancestral deity of the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] and {{ill|Hozumi clan|ja|穂積氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hozumi clan|qq=}}.<ref name="#3"/>
== Shrines == Mikashikiyahime is enshrined at several locations: * {{ill|Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|ja|石切剣箭神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|qq=}}: Within the {{ill|Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|ja|石切剣箭神社#上之社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|qq=|1=Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585189}}, specifically at the Tomireisha and {{ill|Fudō Shrine|ja|婦道神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudō Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Higashi-Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture). * {{ill|Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|ja|矢田坐久志玉比古神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|qq=|1=Yata ni Imasu Kushitamahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11584205}} * {{ill|Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|櫛玉比女命神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|qq=}}
== Notes == {{Notelist}}
== References == {{Reflist}}
== Related Articles == * [[:en:List of Japanese deities|List of Japanese deities]] * {{ill|List of people in ancient Japan|ja|飛鳥時代以前の人物一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of people in ancient Japan|qq=|1=List of ancient Japanese figures|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11665973}}

'''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛, dates unknown) was an ancient Japanese woman.
== Overview == In the [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], she is referred to as '''Tomiyabime''' (登美夜毘売), while the [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] calls her '''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛), '''Torimiyahime''' (鳥見屋媛), or '''Nagasunehime''' (長髄媛). She is also known by names such as '''Mishikiyahime''' (御炊屋姫), '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto''' (櫛玉姫命), or '''Kushitama-hime''' (櫛玉比売命).
== Lineage == Mikashikiyahime was the sister of {{ill|Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagasunehiko|ja|長髄彦|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagasunehiko|qq=}} and the wife of {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|饒速日命|lt=Nigihayahi no Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ}}. Together, they had a son, {{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}, who became the ancestral deity of the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] and {{ill|Hozumi clan|ja|穂積氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hozumi clan|qq=}}.<ref name="#3"/>

'''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛, dates unknown) was an ancient Japanese woman.
== Overview == In the [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], she is referred to as '''Tomiyabime''' (登美夜毘売), while the [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] calls her '''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛), '''Torimiyahime''' (鳥見屋媛), or '''Nagasunehime''' (長髄媛). She is also known by names such as '''Mishikiyahime''' (御炊屋姫), '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto''' (櫛玉姫命), or '''Kushitama-hime''' (櫛玉比売命).
== Lineage == Mikashikiyahime was the sister of {{ill|Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagasunehiko|ja|長髄彦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagasunehiko|qq=}} and the wife of {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|饒速日命|lt=Nigihayahi no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ}}. Together, they had a son, {{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}, who became the ancestral deity of the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] and {{ill|Hozumi clan|ja|穂積氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hozumi clan|qq=}}.<ref name="#3"/>
== Shrines == Mikashikiyahime is enshrined at several locations: * {{ill|Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|ja|石切剣箭神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|qq=}}: Within the {{ill|Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|ja|石切剣箭神社#上之社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|1=Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585189}}, specifically at the Tomireisha and {{ill|Fudō Shrine|ja|婦道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudō Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Higashi-Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture). * {{ill|Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|ja|矢田坐久志玉比古神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|1=Yata ni Imasu Kushitamahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11584205}} * {{ill|Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|櫛玉比女命神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:ミカシキヤヒメ]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:31, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox noble | name = Mikashikiyahime | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = Ancient | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | alias = Mikashikiyahime, Nagasunehime, Torimiyahime<ref name="#1">Nihon Shoki</ref>, Tomiyabime<ref name="#2">Kojiki</ref>, Tomiyabime, Mishikiyahime, Mishikiyahime<ref name="#3">Sendai Kujihongi</ref> | titles = | deification = | posthumous_name = | burial_place = | Rank = | lord = | clan = | parents = | siblings = {{ill|Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagasunehiko|ja|長髄彦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagasunehiko|qq=}}<ref name="#2"/><ref name="#1"/><ref name="#3"/> | spouse ={{ill|Nigihayahi|fr}} | children = {{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}<ref>Sendai Kujihongi, "Tenson Hongi"</ref> | notable_facts = Wife of {{ill|Nigihayahi no Mikoto|ja|饒速日命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ|1=Nigihayahi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10949054}} |child={{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}<ref>Sendai Kujihongi, "Tenson Hongi"</ref>|issue={{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}<ref>Sendai Kujihongi, "Tenson Hongi"</ref>|father=[[Kotoshironushi]]}}
'''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛, dates unknown) was an ancient Japanese woman.
== Overview == In the [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], she is referred to as '''Tomiyabime''' (登美夜毘売), while the [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] calls her '''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛), '''Torimiyahime''' (鳥見屋媛), or '''Nagasunehime''' (長髄媛). She is also known by names such as '''Mishikiyahime''' (御炊屋姫), '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto''' (櫛玉姫命), or '''Kushitama-hime''' (櫛玉比売命).
== Lineage == Mikashikiyahime was the sister of {{ill|Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagasunehiko|ja|長髄彦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagasunehiko|qq=}} and the wife of {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|饒速日命|lt=Nigihayahi no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ}}. Together, they had a son, {{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}, who became the ancestral deity of the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] and {{ill|Hozumi clan|ja|穂積氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hozumi clan|qq=}}.<ref name="#3"/>
== Shrines == Mikashikiyahime is enshrined at several locations: * {{ill|Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|ja|石切剣箭神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|qq=}}: Within the {{ill|Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|ja|石切剣箭神社#上之社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|1=Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585189}}, specifically at the Tomireisha and {{ill|Fudō Shrine|ja|婦道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudō Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Higashi-Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture). * {{ill|Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|ja|矢田坐久志玉比古神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|1=Yata ni Imasu Kushitamahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11584205}} * {{ill|Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|櫛玉比女命神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|qq=}}
== Notes == {{Notelist}}

'''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛, dates unknown) was an ancient Japanese woman.
== Overview == In the [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], she is referred to as '''Tomiyabime''' (登美夜毘売), while the [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] calls her '''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛), '''Torimiyahime''' (鳥見屋媛), or '''Nagasunehime''' (長髄媛). She is also known by names such as '''Mishikiyahime''' (御炊屋姫), '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto''' (櫛玉姫命), or '''Kushitama-hime''' (櫛玉比売命).
== Lineage == Mikashikiyahime was the sister of {{ill|Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagasunehiko|ja|長髄彦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagasunehiko|qq=}} and the wife of {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|饒速日命|lt=Nigihayahi no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ}}. Together, they had a son, {{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}, who became the ancestral deity of the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] and {{ill|Hozumi clan|ja|穂積氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hozumi clan|qq=}}.<ref name="#3"/>
== Shrines == Mikashikiyahime is enshrined at several locations: * {{ill|Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|ja|石切剣箭神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|qq=}}: Within the {{ill|Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|ja|石切剣箭神社#上之社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|1=Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585189}}, specifically at the Tomireisha and {{ill|Fudō Shrine|ja|婦道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudō Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Higashi-Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture). * {{ill|Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|ja|矢田坐久志玉比古神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|1=Yata ni Imasu Kushitamahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11584205}} * {{ill|Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|櫛玉比女命神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:ミカシキヤヒメ]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:31, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox noble | name = Mikashikiyahime | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = Ancient | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | alias = Mikashikiyahime, Nagasunehime, Torimiyahime<ref name="#1">Nihon Shoki</ref>, Tomiyabime<ref name="#2">Kojiki</ref>, Tomiyabime, Mishikiyahime, Mishikiyahime<ref name="#3">Sendai Kujihongi</ref> | titles = | deification = | posthumous_name = | burial_place = | Rank = | lord = | clan = | parents = | siblings = {{ill|Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagasunehiko|ja|長髄彦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagasunehiko|qq=}}<ref name="#2"/><ref name="#1"/><ref name="#3"/> | spouse ={{ill|Nigihayahi|fr}} | children = {{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}<ref>Sendai Kujihongi, "Tenson Hongi"</ref> | notable_facts = Wife of {{ill|Nigihayahi no Mikoto|ja|饒速日命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ|1=Nigihayahi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10949054}} |child={{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}<ref>Sendai Kujihongi, "Tenson Hongi"</ref>|issue={{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}<ref>Sendai Kujihongi, "Tenson Hongi"</ref>|father=[[Kotoshironushi]]}}
'''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛, dates unknown) was an ancient Japanese woman.
== Overview == In the [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], she is referred to as '''Tomiyabime''' (登美夜毘売), while the [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] calls her '''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛), '''Torimiyahime''' (鳥見屋媛), or '''Nagasunehime''' (長髄媛). She is also known by names such as '''Mishikiyahime''' (御炊屋姫), '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto''' (櫛玉姫命), or '''Kushitama-hime''' (櫛玉比売命).
== Lineage == Mikashikiyahime was the sister of {{ill|Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagasunehiko|ja|長髄彦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagasunehiko|qq=}} and the wife of {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|饒速日命|lt=Nigihayahi no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ}}. Together, they had a son, {{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}, who became the ancestral deity of the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] and {{ill|Hozumi clan|ja|穂積氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hozumi clan|qq=}}.<ref name="#3"/>
== Shrines == Mikashikiyahime is enshrined at several locations: * {{ill|Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|ja|石切剣箭神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|qq=}}: Within the {{ill|Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|ja|石切剣箭神社#上之社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|1=Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585189}}, specifically at the Tomireisha and {{ill|Fudō Shrine|ja|婦道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudō Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Higashi-Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture). * {{ill|Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|ja|矢田坐久志玉比古神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|1=Yata ni Imasu Kushitamahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11584205}} * {{ill|Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|櫛玉比女命神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|qq=}}
== Notes == {{Notelist}}
== References == {{Reflist}}
== Related Articles == * [[:en:List of Japanese deities|List of Japanese deities]] * {{ill|List of people in ancient Japan|ja|飛鳥時代以前の人物一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of people in ancient Japan|1=List of ancient Japanese figures|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11665973}}

'''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛, dates unknown) was an ancient Japanese woman.
== Overview == In the [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], she is referred to as '''Tomiyabime''' (登美夜毘売), while the [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] calls her '''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛), '''Torimiyahime''' (鳥見屋媛), or '''Nagasunehime''' (長髄媛). She is also known by names such as '''Mishikiyahime''' (御炊屋姫), '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto''' (櫛玉姫命), or '''Kushitama-hime''' (櫛玉比売命).

Together, they had a son, {{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}, who became the ancestral deity of the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] and {{ill|Hozumi clan|ja|穂積氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hozumi clan|qq=}}.<ref name="#3"/>

'''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛, dates unknown) was an ancient Japanese woman.
== Overview == In the [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], she is referred to as '''Tomiyabime''' (登美夜毘売), while the [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] calls her '''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛), '''Torimiyahime''' (鳥見屋媛), or '''Nagasunehime''' (長髄媛). She is also known by names such as '''Mishikiyahime''' (御炊屋姫), '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto''' (櫛玉姫命), or '''Kushitama-hime''' (櫛玉比売命).
== Lineage == Mikashikiyahime was the sister of {{ill|Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagasunehiko|ja|長髄彦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagasunehiko|qq=}} and the wife of {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|饒速日命|lt=Nigihayahi no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ}}. Together, they had a son, {{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}, who became the ancestral deity of the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] and {{ill|Hozumi clan|ja|穂積氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hozumi clan|qq=}}.<ref name="#3"/>
== Shrines == Mikashikiyahime is enshrined at several locations: * {{ill|Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|ja|石切剣箭神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|qq=}}: Within the {{ill|Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|ja|石切剣箭神社#上之社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|1=Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585189}}, specifically at the Tomireisha and {{ill|Fudō Shrine|ja|婦道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudō Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Higashi-Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture). * {{ill|Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|ja|矢田坐久志玉比古神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|1=Yata ni Imasu Kushitamahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11584205}} * {{ill|Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|櫛玉比女命神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|qq=}}
== Notes == {{Notelist}}
== References == {{Reflist}}
== Related Articles == * [[:en:List of Japanese deities|List of Japanese deities]] * {{ill|List of people in ancient Japan|ja|飛鳥時代以前の人物一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of people in ancient Japan|1=List of ancient Japanese figures|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11665973}}

== Shrines == Mikashikiyahime is enshrined at several locations: * {{ill|Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|ja|石切剣箭神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|qq=}}: Within the {{ill|Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|ja|石切剣箭神社#上之社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|1=Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585189}}, specifically at the Tomireisha and {{ill|Fudō Shrine|ja|婦道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudō Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Higashi-Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture). * {{ill|Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|ja|矢田坐久志玉比古神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|1=Yata ni Imasu Kushitamahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11584205}} * {{ill|Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|櫛玉比女命神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|qq=}}

'''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛, dates unknown) was an ancient Japanese woman.
== Overview == In the [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], she is referred to as '''Tomiyabime''' (登美夜毘売), while the [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] calls her '''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛), '''Torimiyahime''' (鳥見屋媛), or '''Nagasunehime''' (長髄媛). She is also known by names such as '''Mishikiyahime''' (御炊屋姫), '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto''' (櫛玉姫命), or '''Kushitama-hime''' (櫛玉比売命).
== Lineage == Mikashikiyahime was the sister of {{ill|Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagasunehiko|ja|長髄彦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagasunehiko|qq=}} and the wife of {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|饒速日命|lt=Nigihayahi no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ}}. Together, they had a son, {{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}, who became the ancestral deity of the [[:en:Mononobe clan|Mononobe clan]] and {{ill|Hozumi clan|ja|穂積氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hozumi clan|qq=}}.<ref name="#3"/>
== Shrines == Mikashikiyahime is enshrined at several locations: * {{ill|Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|ja|石切剣箭神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|qq=}}: Within the {{ill|Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|ja|石切剣箭神社#上之社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|1=Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585189}}, specifically at the Tomireisha and {{ill|Fudō Shrine|ja|婦道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudō Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Higashi-Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture). * {{ill|Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|ja|矢田坐久志玉比古神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|1=Yata ni Imasu Kushitamahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11584205}} * {{ill|Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|櫛玉比女命神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:ミカシキヤヒメ]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:ミカシキヤヒメ]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:ミカシキヤヒメ]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:31, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox noble | name = Mikashikiyahime | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = Ancient | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | alias = Mikashikiyahime, Nagasunehime, Torimiyahime<ref name="#1">Nihon Shoki</ref>, Tomiyabime<ref name="#2">Kojiki</ref>, Tomiyabime, Mishikiyahime, Mishikiyahime<ref name="#3">Sendai Kujihongi</ref> | titles = | deification = | posthumous_name = | burial_place = | Rank = | lord = | clan = | parents = | siblings = {{ill|Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagasunehiko|ja|長髄彦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagasunehiko|qq=}}<ref name="#2"/><ref name="#1"/><ref name="#3"/> | spouse ={{ill|Nigihayahi|fr}} | children = {{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}<ref>Sendai Kujihongi, "Tenson Hongi"</ref> | notable_facts = Wife of {{ill|Nigihayahi no Mikoto|ja|饒速日命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ|1=Nigihayahi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10949054}} |child={{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}<ref>Sendai Kujihongi, "Tenson Hongi"</ref>|issue={{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}<ref>Sendai Kujihongi, "Tenson Hongi"</ref>|father=[[Kotoshironushi]]}}
'''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛, dates unknown) was an ancient Japanese woman.
== Overview == In the {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}}, she is referred to as '''Tomiyabime''' (登美夜毘売), while the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|WD=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki}} calls her '''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛), '''Torimiyahime''' (鳥見屋媛), or '''Nagasunehime''' (長髄媛). She is also known by names such as '''Mishikiyahime''' (御炊屋姫), '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto''' (櫛玉姫命), or '''Kushitama-hime''' (櫛玉比売命).
== Lineage == Mikashikiyahime was the sister of {{ill|Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagasunehiko|ja|長髄彦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagasunehiko|qq=}} and the wife of {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|饒速日命|lt=Nigihayahi no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ}}. Together, they had a son, {{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}, who became the ancestral deity of the {{ill|Mononobe clan|en|Mononobe clan|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe clan}} and {{ill|Hozumi clan|ja|穂積氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hozumi clan|qq=}}.<ref name="#3"/>
== Shrines == Mikashikiyahime is enshrined at several locations: * {{ill|Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|ja|石切剣箭神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|qq=}}: Within the {{ill|Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|ja|石切剣箭神社#上之社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|1=Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585189}}, specifically at the Tomireisha and {{ill|Fudō Shrine|ja|婦道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudō Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Higashi-Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture). * {{ill|Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|ja|矢田坐久志玉比古神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|1=Yata ni Imasu Kushitamahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11584205}} * {{ill|Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|櫛玉比女命神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|qq=}}
== Notes == {{Notelist}}
== References == {{Reflist}}
== Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Japanese deities|en|List of Japanese deities|WD=Q3240847|lt=List of Japanese deities}} * {{ill|List of people in ancient Japan|ja|飛鳥時代以前の人物一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of people in ancient Japan|1=List of ancient Japanese figures|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11665973}}

== Shrines == Mikashikiyahime is enshrined at several locations: * {{ill|Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|ja|石切剣箭神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|qq=}}: Within the {{ill|Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|ja|石切剣箭神社#上之社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|1=Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585189}}, specifically at the Tomireisha and {{ill|Fudō Shrine|ja|婦道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudō Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Higashi-Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture). * {{ill|Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|ja|矢田坐久志玉比古神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|1=Yata ni Imasu Kushitamahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11584205}} * {{ill|Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|櫛玉比女命神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|qq=}}

'''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛, dates unknown) was an ancient Japanese woman.
== Overview == In the {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}}, she is referred to as '''Tomiyabime''' (登美夜毘売), while the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|WD=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}} calls her '''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛), '''Torimiyahime''' (鳥見屋媛), or '''Nagasunehime''' (長髄媛). She is also known by names such as '''Mishikiyahime''' (御炊屋姫), '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto''' (櫛玉姫命), or '''Kushitama-hime''' (櫛玉比売命).
== Lineage == Mikashikiyahime was the sister of {{ill|Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagasunehiko|ja|長髄彦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagasunehiko|qq=}} and the wife of {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|饒速日命|lt=Nigihayahi no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ}}. Together, they had a son, {{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}, who became the ancestral deity of the {{ill|Mononobe clan|en|Mononobe clan|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe clan|1=Mononobe clan}} and {{ill|Hozumi clan|ja|穂積氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hozumi clan|qq=}}.<ref name="#3"/>
== Shrines == Mikashikiyahime is enshrined at several locations: * {{ill|Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|ja|石切剣箭神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|qq=}}: Within the {{ill|Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|ja|石切剣箭神社#上之社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|1=Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585189}}, specifically at the Tomireisha and {{ill|Fudō Shrine|ja|婦道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudō Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Higashi-Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture). * {{ill|Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|ja|矢田坐久志玉比古神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|1=Yata ni Imasu Kushitamahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11584205}} * {{ill|Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|櫛玉比女命神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|qq=}}

'''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛, dates unknown) was an ancient Japanese woman.
== Overview == In the {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|qid=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}}, she is referred to as '''Tomiyabime''' (登美夜毘売), while the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|qid=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}} calls her '''Mikashikiyahime''' (三炊屋媛), '''Torimiyahime''' (鳥見屋媛), or '''Nagasunehime''' (長髄媛). She is also known by names such as '''Mishikiyahime''' (御炊屋姫), '''Kushitama-hime-no-Mikoto''' (櫛玉姫命), or '''Kushitama-hime''' (櫛玉比売命).
== Lineage == Mikashikiyahime was the sister of {{ill|Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagatsuhiko|lt=Nagasunehiko|ja|長髄彦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagasunehiko|qq=}} and the wife of {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|饒速日命|lt=Nigihayahi no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ}}. Together, they had a son, {{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}, who became the ancestral deity of the {{ill|Mononobe clan|en|Mononobe clan|qid=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe clan|1=Mononobe clan}} and {{ill|Hozumi clan|ja|穂積氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hozumi clan|qq=}}.<ref name="#3"/>
== Shrines == Mikashikiyahime is enshrined at several locations: * {{ill|Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|ja|石切剣箭神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|qq=}}: Within the {{ill|Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|ja|石切剣箭神社#上之社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Upper Shrine (Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine)|1=Ishikiri Tsurugiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11585189}}, specifically at the Tomireisha and {{ill|Fudō Shrine|ja|婦道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudō Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Higashi-Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture). * {{ill|Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|ja|矢田坐久志玉比古神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yataza Kushitama Hikojinja|1=Yata ni Imasu Kushitamahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11584205}} * {{ill|Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|櫛玉比女命神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine|qq=}}
